title: Citylife 6Packs 5L Plastic Storage Boxes with Lids, Clear Stackable Storage Box with Handle, Collection Boxes for Organizing Toys, Snacks, Tools, 26 * 18 * 15CM
features: 【6 x 5 L Boxes】 Includes 6 plastic boxes with lids. Craft box external dimensions: 26 * 18* 15 CM.Internal dimensions: 23 * 16 * 15 CM.Individual small plastic boxes have a capacity of 5L

【Stackable and Nesting】Stackable and modular design to make full use of space. When not in use, it can be stacked with the same boxes. The small storage boxes with lids help keep your supplies organised and easily accessible. Perfect for organising your pantry, wardrobe, bedroom, garage, office, classroom and more

【Clear with Lock】These plastic storage boxes with lids are made of clear plastic, making it easy for you to quickly find what you need. The lids come with handles on the top for easy transport from one place to another. The locking lid prevents dust and dirt from entering and ensures items are safe and secure when stored

【Ideal Solution for Home Storage】 These small storage boxes are ideal for organising snacks, bath toys, crafts, art supplies, office supplies, ornaments, notebooks and to keep your belongings in order. The clear storage box with lid is also ideal for sewing supplies, crafts, fishing tackle, manicure tools, cosmetics, stationery and other small items
【Durable Construction】High quality plastic, sturdy and durable for a variety of applications. The storage box is designed with a sturdy and stable structure
